nasb.text: So the Roman cohort and the commander and the officers of the Jews, arrested Jesus and bound Him,

esv.text: So the band of soldiers and their captain and the officers of the Jews arrested Jesus and bound him.

cnv.text: 於是那一隊兵和千夫長，以及猶太人的差役拿住耶穌，把他綁起來，

ccb.text: 千夫长带着士兵和犹太人的差役上前把耶稣捆绑起来，带了回去。

csbs.text: 于是那队士兵和千夫长，以及犹太人的差役们，抓住耶稣，把他捆绑起来，
